positive: A whimsical, stylized composition featuring a central cluster of glowing celestial elements—a crescent moon, scattered stars, and planets—surrounded by stylized, swirling cosmic nebulae and bioluminescent flora. The style is minimalist, highly graphic, and inspired by Art Nouveau and modern celestial illustration, using clean, strong silhouettes and negative space for maximum impact. Use a palette of deep indigo, sapphire blue, ethereal lavender, and pops of luminous gold and mint green. Composition must be perfectly balanced and designed to be a repeating seamless pattern or a central graphic on clothing. High contrast, vector-like quality, deep depth, volumetric lighting, graphic novel aesthetic, centered composition.
negative: blur, artifacts, low quality, watermark, signature, text, ugly, disfigured, multiple subjects, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, grain, photographic, realistic, busy background
